steps.title: Choose two line points
steps.content: Use two points on the drawn line of best fit, not necessarily two data points. The line passes through approximately $(0,3.2)$ and $(2,4.4)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content: Use change in $y$ over change in $x$: $$ m=\frac{4.4-3.2}{2-0}=\frac{1.2}{2}=0.60 $$ The answer is A.
